title: (3D) Re-bars!
description: Reimagine your iron & copper bars in 3D!
body:
## Let's make the bars look how they should!
Re-bars! is a small 3D resourcepack that will change iron bars to look more metallic, gothic-styled lattice with a new lightweight model.

![Example - 3D iron bars surrounding a tree in a village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nyu2Y8UL/images/a1c735a8d4dca433dddab1d319a28cd64d0c2548.png)

## Upcoming features
- ✅ (added!) copper bars support
- connected textures
- reflections for shaders

Enjoy!
